name: Corrected Total Cell Fluorescence Quantification
description: You are a cell biologist analyzing protein expression levels. Using the 'Fluorescent Cells' sample image in Fiji, quantify the Corrected Total Cell Fluorescence (CTCF) for at least 5 individual cells in the green channel (tubulin). Calculate CTCF using the formula: CTCF = Integrated Density - (Area of Cell * Mean Background Fluorescence). Save the results to a CSV file at ~/ImageJ_Data/results/ctcf_results.csv including columns for Cell ID, Area, Integrated Density, Mean Background, and the calculated CTCF. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
